source.scope: Official-source-backed Liberia calendar-year 2026 employee personal income-tax schedule on caller-confirmed annual gross taxable income.

LR.notes: Employee annual gross taxable income under the 0%, 5%, 15% and 25% schedule. Contractor withholding, non-cash-benefit valuation and employer periodic withholding remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 employee personal income tax on caller-confirmed annual gross taxable income.
